name: Carmel Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple, drained and juice released
4 red delicious apples, unpeeled, cored, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and sugar in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and add it to the flour and sugar mixture. Stir well until combined.
3. Add the apple cider vinegar and pineapple juice. Stir until smooth.
4. Cook the dressing over low heat for a few minutes, stirring constantly. Allow to cool completely (or place in the refrigerator to speed cooling).
5. In another bowl, combine the chopped apples, crushed pineapple, and salted peanuts.
6. Pour the cooled dressing over the apple and pineapple mixture.
7. Fold in the Cool Whip until evenly distributed.
8. Chill the salad well before serving.
This recipe remains true to the original while ensuring clarity and consistency in presentation.
